title: MinerU PDF Parser
description: Convert PDFs, images, and Office documents into clean Markdown and structured JSON using MinerU's vision-language model.

input.name: HuggingFace token
input.description: Only needed for gated or private models on Hugging Face. The default MinerU model is public, so most users can skip this.

input.name: MinerU model source
input.description: Where MinerU pulls weights from. Use Hugging Face by default, ModelScope for a faster mirror in China, or Local for offline setups.

input.name: VLM model override
input.description: Override the VLM model name. Only applies to the http-client backends. The auto-engine backends always load MinerU's default model.

input.name: S3 endpoint URL (optional)
input.description: Endpoint URL for an S3-compatible bucket. Only needed when callers request large outputs via S3. Works with AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, and MinIO.

input.name: S3 bucket name (optional)
input.description: Name of the S3-compatible bucket to upload to. Only needed when callers request large outputs via S3.

input.name: S3 access key ID (optional)
input.description: Access key ID for the S3-compatible bucket. Only needed when callers request large outputs via S3. Stored on the worker, never exposed to jobs.

input.name: S3 secret access key (optional)
input.description: Secret access key for the S3-compatible bucket. Only needed when callers request large outputs via S3. Stored on the worker, never exposed to jobs.

input.name: Max concurrent jobs per worker
input.description: Concurrent jobs per worker. Default 1 is safe everywhere. See the scaling guide before raising on smaller GPUs.

input.name: Refresh worker after N jobs
input.description: Recycle the worker after this many successful jobs to release VRAM fragmentation. 0 (default) disables.

input.name: Refresh worker after N cumulative pages
input.description: Recycle the worker after this many cumulative pages. 0 (default) disables. Only bounded page slices contribute.

input.name: Worker log format
input.description: Worker log output format. JSON is easier to filter in dashboards; text is human-readable for local development.

input.name: MinerU pipeline batch window (pages)
input.description: Pages per pipeline batch window. Lower reduces VRAM, higher trades VRAM for throughput. Pipeline backend only. Empty = default 64.

input.name: MinerU PDF render timeout (seconds)
input.description: Seconds before MinerU kills a hung PDF page render. Raise for very complex PDFs. Empty = default 300.

input.name: MinerU PDF render threads
input.description: CPU threads for PDF rasterization. Raise on high-vCPU pods for image-heavy PDFs. Empty = default 4.
